suggested_next_changes: Tune early enemy pressure, healing cadence, or tutorial log hints without removing LOSS or changing structured actions.

summary: As a less tactical player, the v003 play on seed seed_002 lost before the end in 22 turns (floors reached 1, invalid actions 0). The player lost on floor 1 after 22 turns with 20 damage taken.

top_issues.diagnosis: Early losses can be fair tension, but repeated low-floor deaths suggest onboarding or pressure tuning problems.

evidence.detail: Playthrough ended with terminal result LOSS after 22 recorded turns.

top_issues.recommendation: Tune early enemy pressure, healing cadence, or tutorial log hints without removing LOSS or changing structured actions.
